name: aukora
description: Aukora: a governed recursive digital-organism seed. Its constitutional spine is the AUMLOK authority kernel (verify, never mint). Pure portable packages (kernel, evidence, council, memory) plus governed organism adapters — the reactive memory brain, sandbox-only recursion seed, and read-only operator console — built outward under strict governance.
author: Aumara

scripts.boundary: node scripts/check-canonical-boundary.mjs --src packages/evidence/src && node scripts/check-canonical-boundary.mjs --src packages/council/src && node scripts/check-canonical-boundary.mjs --src packages/council-node/src
scripts.test:kernel: npm run test:portable-boundary && npm run typecheck:kernel && npm test --workspace @aukora/kernel && npm run build:kernel && npm run verify:kernel-compatibility && npm run verify:kernel-sbom && npm run verify:kernel-runtimes && npm run verify:kernel-package
scripts.fixture:console: npm run build:kernel && npm run fixture --workspace @aukora/console && git diff --exit-code -- apps/console/public/fixture.json apps/console/public/fixture.js apps/console/docs/spatial-map.svg
scripts.test:organism: npm run test:memory && npm run test:brain && npm run test:seed && npm run test:console
scripts.test:all: npm run verify:provenance && npm run boundary && npm run test && npm run test:kernel && npm run test:organism && npm run fixture:console
